description: Fill documentation gaps for SDK features: add missing fetch utilities to plugin development guide, document Zod schema overloads, document typed prompts with args schema, and document ResourceDefinition schema property.
qualityChecks: cd docs && bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run knip && bun run format:check

userStories.title: Add postForm and postFormData utilities to plugin development guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the development guide to mention postForm and postFormData so that I know these HTTP utilities exist for form submissions.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx mentions postForm with a brief description (POST with URL-encoded form body) and a short code example
docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx mentions postFormData with a brief description (POST with multipart/form-data body) and a short code example
Both are listed alongside the existing putJSON, patchJSON, deleteJSON mention
The import statement example includes postForm and postFormData
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes

userStories.title: Add note about Zod schema validation overloads for fetch utilities in plugin development guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the guide to mention that fetch utilities support Zod schema validation so that I can use runtime-validated API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx includes a brief note or subsection explaining that all fetch utilities (fetchJSON, postJSON, putJSON, patchJSON, deleteJSON) accept an optional Zod schema parameter for runtime response validation
At least one code example showing the schema overload pattern (e.g., fetchJSON with a Zod schema as the third argument)
A cross-reference to the SDK utilities reference page for full API details
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes

userStories.title: Document typed prompts with Zod args schema in resources-prompts guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the resources-prompts guide to show the Zod args pattern for definePrompt so that I can use typed prompt arguments.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/guides/resources-prompts.mdx includes a section or example showing definePrompt with a Zod args schema
The example shows the args property with a z.object() schema and demonstrates that render() receives typed arguments
The section explains that arguments metadata is auto-generated from the Zod schema
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes

userStories.title: Document optional schema property on ResourceDefinition in resources-prompts guide and SDK reference
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want to know that ResourceDefinition supports an optional Zod schema for type-safe content so that I can get typed resource reads.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/guides/resources-prompts.mdx includes a brief note or example showing the optional schema property on ResourceDefinition
docs/content/docs/sdk/resources.mdx documents the schema property in the ResourceDefinition interface section
At least one code example shows defineResource with a schema and demonstrates typed content in the read() handler
cd docs && bun run build passes
cd docs && bun run type-check passes
cd docs && bun run lint passes
cd docs && bun run knip passes
cd docs && bun run format:check passes
